message:
feat(membrane): harden TLS cache safety, expand runtime math tests, and apply clippy fixes

TLS cache use-after-free prevention (arena.rs, tls_cache.rs, ptr_validator.rs):
- Bump global TLS-cache epoch on every arena free() so thread-local cached
  validations cannot return stale CachedValid results for freed pointers
- Add ptr_validator test proving that after free(), the TLS cache does not
  allow a use-after-free: validates that CachedValid is never returned for
  a freed address

Grobner canonicalization proofs (grobner.rs):
- Equivalent signatures reduce to same normal form (order-independent)
- Reduction is idempotent: double-reducing any mask yields same result
- Confluence: all 64 support patterns converge within ≤3 steps
- Bounded runtime: 100k classifications complete in <200ms
- O(1) reducer: max steps across all patterns is ≤3
- No performance degradation with large masks (high bits ignored)
- All 8 canonical class IDs reachable from the 64 support patterns

Healing integration tests (heal.rs):
- Canonical class NONE yields no healing action
- All canonical classes map to valid healing actions
- Out-of-range class IDs safely return ReturnSafeDefault

Sobol quasi-random generator (sobol.rs):
- Replace manual index loops with idiomatic iterator .zip() patterns
  (clippy needless_range_loop fix)
- Replace manual range check with (1..=MAX_DIM).contains()
- Fix dim1 test to use 7 points (2^k - 1 for correct stratification)
- Add coverage evidence: Sobol probes produce >16 distinct masks
- Add monotone coverage fraction test across epochs
- Add scheduling path bounded-time proof (10k epochs < 100ms)
- Add O(1) per-call perf test (no degradation with index advancement)
- Fix wrapping test to use direct state manipulation instead of
  expensive skip(u32::MAX)

SOS barrier coefficients (sos_barrier.rs):
- Retune invariant polynomial coefficients for improved barrier
  certificate tightness

Sparse matrix (sparse.rs):
- Additional sparse matrix operations and tests

Design module (design.rs):
- Make probe_cost_ns() pub for cross-module access

Module wiring (lib.rs):
- Expose grobner module at crate root via #[path] attribute

Benchmarks (runtime_math_kernels_bench.rs):
- Add approachability_observe and approachability_summary benchmarks
  measuring steady-state (post-calibration) hot path performance

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
